requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency / Ecodesign Requirements — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Turkey, EU-aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/生态设计要求——家用制冷器具（土耳其，与欧盟对齐）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/生態設計要求——家用製冷器具（土耳其，與歐盟對齊）

summary.en: Turkey applies EU-aligned ecodesign / minimum energy-performance requirements for household refrigerating appliances placed on its market, administered by the Ministry of Trade (and historically associated with the former Ministry of Energy energy-efficiency framework). These requirements transpose the substance of EU Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 and apply to refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezers, wine-storage appliances, and absorption refrigerators. Key requirements include: (1) Maximum energy consumption limits — appliances must not exceed an Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) calculated from rated volume, climate class, and a reference consumption formula; (2) Minimum rated volume per compartment type; (3) Noise declaration requirements (dB(A) re 1 pW); (4) Product information requirements — technical parameters must be declared to the Turkish energy-efficiency regime before market placement; (5) No-load energy consumption limits for freezers with fast-freeze function. Measurement is performed to the TS EN 62552 series (TS EN 62552-1 / -2 / -3), the TSE-adopted harmonised measurement standards. The grid reference for testing reflects Turkey's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 土耳其对投放其市场的家用制冷器具实行与欧盟对齐的生态设计/最低能效要求，由贸易部管理（历史上亦与原能源部能效框架相关）。该等要求转化采纳欧盟法规（EU）2019/2019的实质内容，适用范围涵盖电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒类贮藏器具及吸收式电冰箱。核心要求包括：（1）最大耗电量限制——器具的能效指数（EEI）不得超过根据额定容积、气候等级及参考耗电量公式计算所得的限值；（2）各隔间类型的最低额定容积；（3）噪声声明要求（分贝(A)以1皮瓦为基准）；（4）产品信息要求——在投放市场前须向土耳其能效制度声明技术参数；（5）带速冻功能冷冻箱的无负荷耗电量限制。测量依据TSE采纳的协调测量标准TS EN 62552系列（TS EN 62552-1 / -2 / -3）进行。检测的电网基准反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供电。
summary.zht: 土耳其對投放其市場的家用製冷器具實行與歐盟對齊的生態設計/最低能效要求，由貿易部管理（歷史上亦與原能源部能效框架相關）。該等要求轉化採納歐盟法規（EU）2019/2019的實質內容，適用範圍涵蓋電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒類貯藏器具及吸收式電冰箱。核心要求包括：（1）最大耗電量限制——器具的能效指數（EEI）不得超過根據額定容積、氣候等級及參考耗電量公式計算所得的限值；（2）各隔間類型的最低額定容積；（3）噪聲聲明要求（分貝(A)以1皮瓦為基準）；（4）產品資訊要求——在投放市場前須向土耳其能效制度聲明技術參數；（5）帶速凍功能冷凍箱的無負荷耗電量限制。測量依據TSE採納的協調測量標準TS EN 62552系列（TS EN 62552-1 / -2 / -3）進行。檢測的電網基準反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供電。

standards_or_laws: Turkey ecodesign / energy-efficiency technical regulation for household refrigerating appliances (EU-aligned, transposing the substance of Regulation (EU) 2019/2019; published in the Resmî Gazete / Official Gazette; administered by the Ministry of Trade)
TS EN 62552-1 / TS EN 62552-2 / TS EN 62552-3 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (TSE-adopted harmonised measurement standards for ecodesign and energy labelling)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the energy labelling system administered by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. The GB 12021.2 framework uses a different test methodology and EEI calculation basis than the Turkish EU-aligned regime — Turkish/EU EEI values and Chinese energy grades are not directly comparable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的试验方法及EEI计算基准与土耳其的欧盟对齐制度不同——土耳其/欧盟EEI值与中国能效等级不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的試驗方法及EEI計算基準與土耳其的歐盟對齊制度不同——土耳其/歐盟EEI值與中國能效等級不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three major gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and the Turkish EU-aligned ecodesign requirements: (1) Different EEI calculation — the Turkish regime (mirroring Regulation (EU) 2019/2019 Annex IV) specifies a precise EEI formula based on rated volume and compartment type; GB 12021.2-2015 uses a different grade-based framework. A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee compliance with Turkish EEI thresholds without independent recalculation to the EU-aligned methodology. (2) Turkish energy-efficiency declaration — manufacturers/importers must prepare the technical declaration to the Turkish energy-efficiency regime administered by the Ministry of Trade before market placement; there is no equivalent Chinese pre-declaration obligation for export models. (3) Stricter EU-aligned thresholds — the Turkish regime tracks EU second-tier EEI thresholds, which may disqualify refrigerators that meet only Chinese Grade 1 standards. Measurement to the TS EN 62552 series is required.
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与土耳其欧盟对齐的生态设计要求之间存在三大差距：（1）EEI计算方法不同——土耳其制度（对应法规（EU）2019/2019附件IV）规定了基于额定容积和隔间类型的精确EEI计算公式；GB 12021.2-2015采用不同的等级框架。中国1级或2级能效评定不等同于符合土耳其EEI门槛，须按欧盟对齐方法独立重新计算。（2）土耳其能效声明——制造商/进口商须在投放市场前向贸易部管理的土耳其能效制度准备技术声明。中国对出口产品无同等的预声明义务。（3）更严格的欧盟对齐门槛——土耳其制度追踪欧盟第二阶段EEI门槛，可能使仅符合中国1级标准的电冰箱不合格。须依据TS EN 62552系列进行测量。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與土耳其歐盟對齊的生態設計要求之間存在三大差距：（1）EEI計算方法不同——土耳其制度（對應法規（EU）2019/2019附件IV）規定了基於額定容積和隔間類型的精確EEI計算公式；GB 12021.2-2015採用不同的等級框架。中國1級或2級能效評定不等同於符合土耳其EEI門檻，須按歐盟對齊方法獨立重新計算。（2）土耳其能效聲明——製造商/進口商須在投放市場前向貿易部管理的土耳其能效制度準備技術聲明。中國對出口產品無同等的預聲明義務。（3）更嚴格的歐盟對齊門檻——土耳其制度追蹤歐盟第二階段EEI門檻，可能使僅符合中國1級標準的電冰箱不合格。須依據TS EN 62552系列進行測量。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with the Turkish EU-aligned ecodesign / minimum energy-performance requirements and the Turkish energy-efficiency declaration are legally required before market placement; administered by the Ministry of Trade
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Trade (Ticaret Bakanlığı)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Turkey's EU-aligned ecodesign / energy-performance requirements are legally binding for market placement of household refrigerators. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades do not substitute for Turkish EEI compliance — independent measurement to TS EN 62552 and EEI recalculation to the EU-aligned Annex IV methodology are required. The Turkish energy-efficiency declaration must be prepared before any unit enters the market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 土耳其与欧盟对齐的生态设计/能效要求对家用电冰箱在土耳其市场投放具有法律约束力。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代土耳其EEI合规——须依据TS EN 62552独立测量并按欧盟对齐的附件IV方法重新计算EEI。土耳其能效声明须在任何产品进入市场前准备完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 土耳其與歐盟對齊的生態設計/能效要求對家用電冰箱在土耳其市場投放具有法律約束力。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代土耳其EEI合規——須依據TS EN 62552獨立測量並按歐盟對齊的附件IV方法重新計算EEI。土耳其能效聲明須在任何產品進入市場前準備完成。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Turkish Energy Label (EU-aligned A-to-G) + Energy-Efficiency Declaration
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——土耳其能效标签（与欧盟对齐的A至G）+ 能效声明
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——土耳其能效標籤（與歐盟對齊的A至G）+ 能效聲明

summary.en: Turkey's energy labelling technical regulation for refrigerating appliances (EU-aligned, mirroring Regulation (EU) 2019/2016) requires that all household refrigerating appliances placed on the Turkish market bear the Turkish energy label displaying the energy efficiency class (A to G scale, rescaled in line with the EU 2021 rescaling), annual energy consumption (kWh/annum), noise class and level, total volume of each compartment type, and the model identifier. Suppliers/importers must prepare the product datasheet and energy-efficiency declaration to the Turkish regime (administered by the Ministry of Trade) before market placement and provide the label graphic. Dealers must display the label in-store and in online listings. The label format and content requirements follow the EU-aligned annexes adopted by Turkey, with Turkish-language text. The label reflects the Turkish 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 土耳其制冷器具能效标识技术法规（与欧盟对齐，对应法规（EU）2019/2016）要求所有投放土耳其市场的家用制冷器具须附贴土耳其能效标签，标注能效等级（A至G评级，与欧盟2021年重新调整一致）、年耗电量（千瓦时/年）、噪声等级及噪声值、各类隔间总容积以及型号标识符。供应商/进口商须在投放市场前向土耳其制度（由贸易部管理）准备产品数据表及能效声明，并提供标签图形。经销商须在门店及在线商品列表中展示该标签。标签格式和内容要求遵循土耳其采纳的欧盟对齐附件，并采用土耳其语文本。标签反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz电网。
summary.zht: 土耳其製冷器具能效標識技術法規（與歐盟對齊，對應法規（EU）2019/2016）要求所有投放土耳其市場的家用製冷器具須附貼土耳其能效標籤，標注能效等級（A至G評級，與歐盟2021年重新調整一致）、年耗電量（千瓦時/年）、噪聲等級及噪聲值、各類隔間總容積以及型號識別符。供應商/進口商須在投放市場前向土耳其制度（由貿易部管理）準備產品數據表及能效聲明，並提供標籤圖形。經銷商須在門店及線上商品列表中展示該標籤。標籤格式和內容要求遵循土耳其採納的歐盟對齊附件，並採用土耳其語文本。標籤反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz電網。

standards_or_laws: Turkey energy labelling technical regulation for refrigerating appliances (EU-aligned, mirroring Regulation (EU) 2019/2016; published in the Resmî Gazete / Official Gazette; administered by the Ministry of Trade)
Turkey framework regulation on energy labelling of energy-related products (EU-aligned, mirroring Regulation (EU) 2017/1369)
Turkish energy-efficiency declaration / product datasheet — required before market placement

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. There is no pre-registration database; manufacturers self-declare grade based on testing against GB 12021.2. The Turkish EU-aligned A-to-G label and China's 1-to-5 grade system are structurally different and not cross-comparable without recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识制度依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，采用中国能效标识（CEL）体系，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。目前没有预注册数据库；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明能效等级。土耳其与欧盟对齐的A至G标签与中国1至5级体系在结构上存在差异，未经重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識制度依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，採用中國能效標識（CEL）體系，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。目前沒有預登記數據庫；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明能效等級。土耳其與歐盟對齊的A至G標籤與中國1至5級體系在結構上存在差異，未經重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no direct Chinese equivalent: (1) Turkish energy-efficiency declaration — each model's technical parameters, EEI value (EU-aligned methodology), noise level, and compartment volumes must be declared to the Turkish regime before the first unit ships; (2) Physical Turkish energy label — the A-to-G label (EU-aligned format, Turkish-language text) must be affixed or available at point of sale and in online listings. Chinese CEL labels must be replaced or supplemented; they cannot serve as the Turkish label. Ministry of Trade market surveillance actively checks labelling and declarations, particularly for products sold online. The label values must reflect Turkey's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求在中国无直接对应规定：（1）土耳其能效声明——每款产品的技术参数、EEI值（欧盟对齐方法）、噪声级及隔间容积须在首批产品发货前向土耳其制度声明；（2）实体土耳其能效标签——A至G标签（欧盟对齐格式、土耳其语文本）须在销售点及在线商品列表中展示。中国能效标识须被替换或补充；不能充当土耳其标签使用。贸易部市场监管会主动核查标识和声明，尤其针对在线销售产品。标签数值须反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求在中國無直接對應規定：（1）土耳其能效聲明——每款產品的技術參數、EEI值（歐盟對齊方法）、噪聲級及隔間容積須在首批產品發貨前向土耳其制度聲明；（2）實體土耳其能效標籤——A至G標籤（歐盟對齊格式、土耳其語文本）須在銷售點及線上商品列表中展示。中國能效標識須被替換或補充；不能充當土耳其標籤使用。貿易部市場監管會主動核查標識和聲明，尤其針對線上銷售產品。標籤數值須反映土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Turkish energy label display and energy-efficiency declaration are legally required before market placement under the EU-aligned energy labelling technical regulation; rescaled A-to-G label
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Trade (Ticaret Bakanlığı)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Turkish energy-efficiency declaration and energy label display are mandatory hard gates for market access for household refrigerators in Turkey. Chinese exporters must complete the Turkish declaration (with TS EN 62552-based measurements and EU-aligned EEI calculation) before any unit enters the market. The Chinese CEL label does not satisfy Turkish labelling obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 土耳其能效声明与能效标签展示是家用电冰箱进入土耳其市场的强制性门槛。中国出口商须在任何产品进入市场前完成土耳其声明（依据TS EN 62552测量及欧盟对齐EEI计算）。中国能效标识不满足土耳其标识义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 土耳其能效聲明與能效標籤展示是家用電冰箱進入土耳其市場的強制性門檻。中國出口商須在任何產品進入市場前完成土耳其聲明（依據TS EN 62552測量及歐盟對齊EEI計算）。中國能效標識不滿足土耳其標識義務。
